_meta.method: Checked the Plum Village international sangha directory, Wake Up network listings, Kwan Um center list, and World Buddhist Directory entries for Egypt; no formally affiliated Plum Village, Kwan Um, or AZI Zen centers with a fixed public meeting address were found.
_meta.coverageEstimate: 0% (no verified Plum Village / Kwan Um / AZI Zen centers located in Egypt).
knownGaps: Local mindfulness or Thich Nhat Hanh reading groups may exist in Cairo and other cities, but current listings only show generic Meetup groups without clear Plum Village affiliation or stable venues.
Some retreats in the Plum Village tradition may be organized regionally (e.g., trips from Europe) without establishing a permanent Egyptian practice center.
